name: Finca Binillubet
description: A visit to a working livestock farm with an artisan cheese-making workshop and a sensory tasting of local produce, led by the owners themselves. A more intimate, hands-on experience, meeting the herd and following the whole process.

highlights: do the artisan cheese workshop with the farmers themselves
the sensory tasting of PDO Mahón-Menorca cheese and local products
book before you go (guided visit on a working livestock farm)
